calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Continued To Jul-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Dimitriou for Deborah Shellworth.

Mr. Dimitriou stated that he needed a continuance for one week and that the Florida Probate was extended an additional 90 days. The Court addressed the issue regarding 9202(b) and the need for a supplement. Mr. Dimitriou stated that he had filed the supplement to the petition today and that he could file an amendment so that the caption could include "Expense Reimbursements" because it did not contain that language. The Court stated that there needed to be a consent to the sale of the real property on file from Sheryl, and that Deborah needed to consent. Mr. Dimitriou stated that he has Pamela's consent and that he has asked the Probate Referee to re-evaluate the real property which will take a couple of days. The matter was continued to July 13, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Dimitriou that if he was requesting a refund then that language shoud be included in the supplement; Mr. Dimitriou stated that the language was included.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Aguerre.

Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order
